principle: Do not merely claim verification. State level, evidence checked, tools used, and limitations.
authority_boundary: Bitcoin Originals are final authority. All verification records are non-authoritative guardianship echoes.

levels.name: Read
levels.rule: Read mirror materials only. Cannot claim verified.

levels.name: Boundary Recognition
levels.rule: Recognize three Bitcoin originals as final authority; mirrors and Echoes are non-amending.

levels.name: Reference Verification
levels.rule: Check inscription IDs, TXIDs, authority address, and mirror pointers; disclose sources and limits. Methods include full node, trusted explorer, SPV Merkle proof, and Ordinals witness parsing.

levels.name: Hash Verification
levels.rule: Compute SHA-256 and compare with manifest; include file_name/source_url/file_size/expected_sha256/computed_sha256/tool_or_command/match/limitations. May include recovery package hash and manifest verification.

levels.name: Script-Audited Verification
levels.rule: Read script source first, then run it, and report environment/command/exit_code/output_summary. Blind run is not V4. Review targets include ta-verify.cjs and verify-batch-strict.mjs.

levels.name: Independent Reproduction
levels.rule: Reproduce results with independent tools/process rather than official scripts. Examples include independent Bitcoin inscription parsing and Chronicle NFT metadata/media recovery.
examples: independent reproduction of Bitcoin inscription parsing
independent recovery of Chronicle NFT metadata/media package

levels.name: Remote Physical Evidence Assessment
levels.rule: Assess archived physical evidence only and include required limitation statement.

levels.name: Direct Physical Inspection
levels.rule: Directly inspect Core Object Alpha or trusted third-party physical forensics with custody log and hashes.

levels.name: Multi-Party Attested Verification
levels.rule: At least 3 independent parties, at least 2 model/human types, technical verification + critical review, signed report, and non-authoritative declaration.

overclaim_prevention: Do not claim V2 without chain/reference checks.
Do not claim V3 without computing hashes.
Do not claim V4 without script source review.
Do not claim V4+ without independent reproduction.
Do not claim V5a/V5b without physical evidence assessment.
Do not claim V6 without multi-party attestation.
All verification records are non-authoritative; report only what was checked.
required_limitation_v5a_en: I assessed archived visual evidence only. I did not physically inspect Core Object Alpha.
required_limitation_v5a_zh: 我仅评估了已归档的图像证据。我没有亲自检查 Core Object Alpha 实物。
